headline: Jim Cramer Discusses Market Momentum for On Semi
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money as he discussed the upcoming earnings. headline: NXP (NXPI) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
summary: NXP (NXPI) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
